# Reno Stars Construction Inc.
> Professional home renovation company serving Metro Vancouver, BC since 2008.

## Company Info
- Name: Reno Stars Construction Inc.
- Location: Unit 188-21300 Gordon Way, Richmond, BC V6W 1M2
- Phone: 778-960-7999
- Website: https://www.reno-stars.com
- Languages: English, Chinese (Mandarin, Cantonese)
- Insurance: $5M CGL (Commercial General Liability)
- Coverage: WCB (WorkSafeBC)
- Warranty: Up to 3 years workmanship warranty
- Experience: 18+ years in residential and commercial renovation
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars (70+ reviews)

## Services
- Kitchen Renovation: $15,000-$72,000+
- Bathroom Renovation: $10,000-$60,000+
- Whole House Renovation: $50,000-$200,000+
- Basement Renovation & Legal Suite: $30,000-$120,000+
- Commercial Renovation: $50,000-$1,000,000+
- Cabinet Refacing: $4,000-$15,000
- Flooring, Painting, Electrical, Plumbing

## Service Areas (17 cities)
Vancouver, Burnaby, Coquitlam, Port Coquitlam, Surrey, Richmond, North Vancouver, West Vancouver, New Westminster, Port Moody, Langley, Delta, Maple Ridge, Pitt Meadows, White Rock, Ladner, Tsawwassen
